Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-45570 affecting package packer for versions less than 1.9.5-17
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-45570 affecting package packer for versions less than 1.9.5-17. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package packer is earlier than 1.9.5-17, affected by CVE-2026-45570
